paragraphs.context: koenigsegg regera v agera rst drag race _ transcript what will happen in a drag race between a koigseg reggera and a koigseg aggera rs? well, we ' re going to find out by racing them over the standing quarter mile. i ' m watson and you ' re watching carw wow. and before we race, i just want to show you how cool the doors are on these koig eggs. so, this is the reggera and it is electrically operated. it ' s going to do its thing. a so satisfying on the aggera. you have to do it manually, but it ' s still very nice to do. look. oh. oh. ah, lovely. hello, tom. how you doing? > > i ' m good. how are you, mate? > > this is tom from wondon. this is his car. um, listen, i know you raced in our last video with your car, but the internet said you weren ' t very good at driving. i don ' t agree with the internet, but i think we ' ll get someone else to drive today. is that right? > > fair enough. the koix egg reggera has a 5 l twin turbo v8 running on e85 fuel plus three electric motors for a total system output of 1500 horsepower and 2, 000 newton meters of torque. it sends power to the rear wheels only via a single speed torque converter gearbox. the single gear ratio is set for top speed with the three electric motors providing most of the thrust at low speeds and filling in the hole in torque until the engine is on boost. the reggera weighs 1, 590 kg and is worth around3 million pounds today. it ' s running on mitchell cup 2 tires. the koix agera rs has the same 5 l twin turbo v8 running on e85 fuel, but without the support of the electric motors. so, it develops 1, 360 horsepower and 1570 nm of torque. it sends power to the rear wheels only via a seven - speed dual clutch automatic gearbox with launch control. it weighs in at 1, 395 kg and is also worth around £3 million today. just like the reggera, it ' s also running on michelin cup 2 tires. well, this is rather interesting, isn ' t it?
